reference: There seems to be no relation with Neurobion. However, these symptoms may be related to some cervical pathology. He should undergo a magnetic resonance imaging scan of the cervical vertebrae. If it is normal, then he may need some neck exercises as well as avoidance of using a pillow.
text: There seems to be no relation with neurobion; however, these symptoms may be related to some cervical pathology. He should undergo a magnetic resonance imaging scan of the cervical vertebrae; if it is normal, then he may need some neck exercises as well as avoidance of using the pillow.
